# CTOS Portfolio Roadmap
# 04 — Experience Layer (RMD v1.0)

## Objective
Define recruiter-first, founder-friendly, and developer-focused user experience architecture for the portfolio.

## Experience Vision
Create a portfolio that feels like a premium product experience rather than a personal website.

## User Journeys
### Recruiter Journey
Hero → Proof Signals → Featured Case Study → Resume → Contact

### Founder Journey
Hero → Architecture Philosophy → Flagship Project → Contact

### Developer Journey
Hero → Projects → Case Studies → Technical Notes → GitHub

## Homepage Experience Architecture
1. Hero
2. Proof Signals
3. System Overview
4. Featured Case Study
5. Projects
6. Architecture Philosophy
7. Notes
8. Certificates
9. Contact
10. Visitor Globe

## Navigation Psychology
- Minimize cognitive load
- Surface primary actions first
- Command Palette always available

## Information Density Strategy
- Hero: Low
- Project Cards: Medium
- Case Studies: High
- Technical Notes: Medium

## CTA Strategy
Primary: Explore Projects
Secondary: View Case Studies
Tertiary: Contact

## Search Experience
Sources:
- Projects
- Case Studies
- Notes
- Certificates

## Command Palette UX
Shortcut:
- CTRL + K
- CMD + K

Functions:
- Search
- Navigate
- Theme Switch
- Language Switch
- Resume Access

## Certificate Vault UX
- Grid View
- Preview Modal
- Verification Links

## Visitor Globe UX
Purpose: Trust Signal
Placement: Near Footer

## Accessibility Rules
- Keyboard Navigation
- Focus States
- Reduced Motion Support
- Screen Reader Compatibility

## Mobile Experience
- One-Hand Reachability
- Fast Loading
- Reduced Motion

## Conversion Goals
- Resume Download
- Contact Click
- GitHub Visit
- Case Study Read

## AI Agent Rules
- Clarity before complexity
- Experience before animation
- Recruiter journey has highest priority

## Definition of Done
- Homepage UX finalized
- Navigation finalized
- Search UX finalized
- Command Palette UX finalized
- Accessibility validated
- Mobile UX validated

## Next Layer
05-motion-layer.rmd
